recommendations.title: Retribution
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious caller plants a bomb under his car seat, a bank executive begins a high-speed chase across the city to complete a specific series of tasks — all with his kids trapped in the back seat.

recommendations.title: Suspense.
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her maidservant in an isolated country house, a mother must protect herself and her baby from an invading tramp while her husband races home in a stolen car to save them.

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: Hard Hit
recommendations.overview: On his way to work, a bank manager receives an anonymous call claiming there's a bomb under his car seat, and if anyone exits the car, it will explode unless he can pay a ransom.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A chilling real-time thriller featuring a teenager, Casey, battling with an anonymous cyber-stalker.

recommendations.title: The Ultimate Gift
recommendations.overview: When his wealthy grandfather finally dies, Jason Stevens fully expects to benefit when it comes to the reading of the will. But instead of a sizable inheritance, Jason receives a test, a series of tasks he must complete before he can get any money.

recommendations.title: Money
recommendations.overview: Two wealthy businessmen are about to get away with $5 million in ill-gotten money until their plans are revealed by an uninvited house guest.

recommendations.title: Maria Full of Grace
recommendations.overview: A pregnant Colombian teenager becomes a drug mule to make some desperately needed money for her family.

recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.
